creator: kristinacors
caption: $100 hotels in New York City are almost non existent so had to share this insane deal! #travelhack #traveldeal #hoteldeals #nyc #travelcontentcreator

transcription.text: Travel deal alert! Arlo Hotels is dropping rooms for $100. So every single day from 10am to 11am, you can book $100 same-day stays. By the way, there are Arlo Hotels in New York, in Midtown, Nomad, Soho, and Williamsburg. They also have Arlo Hotels here. Follow for more travel deals like this.
